source_policy: Shared context/distractor text manifests are normalized from CC0/public-domain compatible sources and Trace-authored templates. Runtime tasks should use these strings as non-answer context unless the verifier explicitly scopes them in.

corpora_project.description: Darius Kazemi's Corpora Project word and category lists.

trace_context_templates.description: Trace-authored neutral templates for chart, graph, and page context text.

domains/industries_corpora.txt.description: Industry labels used as topic/context fillers.

paragraphs/context_long_blocks.txt.description: Trace-generated longer neutral context blocks built from CC0 word pools and templates.

paragraphs/context_template_blocks.txt.description: Trace-generated two-sentence context blocks built from neutral context sentence templates.

phrases/callout_phrases.txt.description: Short callout labels for annotation boxes.

phrases/captions.txt.description: Caption strings for non-answer chart, graph, and page context.

phrases/headlines.txt.description: Short neutral headline/title strings for report and chart/page chrome.

phrases/legend_notes.txt.description: Legend-like explanatory strings for context panels.

phrases/metric_snippets.txt.description: Decorative metric snippets containing numbers for distractor text.

phrases/sidebar_notes.txt.description: Sidebar-note strings for non-answer context panels.

phrases/source_notes.txt.description: Source-note strings for footer and margin context.

sentences/context_template_sentences.txt.description: Trace-generated neutral context sentences built from CC0 word pools and templates.

words/adjectives_corpora.txt.description: Normalized CC0 word pool used by Trace context text templates.

words/adverbs_corpora.txt.description: Normalized CC0 word pool used by Trace context text templates.

words/nouns_corpora.txt.description: Normalized CC0 word pool used by Trace context text templates.

words/verbs_corpora.txt.description: Normalized CC0 word pool used by Trace context text templates.
